## What does this PR do?

<!-- One or two sentences. What changed and why. -->

## Linked issue

Closes #<!-- issue number -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `chore` — tooling, deps, no production code change
- [ ] `refactor` — internal change, no behavioural difference
- [ ] `test` — adding or fixing tests
- [ ] `perf` — performance improvement
- [ ] **Breaking change** — bumps minor while pre-1.0, major after

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the style in `CONTRIBUTING.md` (`make check` passes locally)
- [ ] New/changed behaviour has tests
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Public API changes are documented (README and/or docstrings)
- [ ] No new direct dependencies, or new deps justified in the description
